# supermodel-api-docs Architecture Docs

## Entitys
- [Authentication Domain — supermodel-api-docs Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/supermodel-api-docs/domain-authentication.html): Defines the security protocols and access patterns for the API. Architectural overview of the Authentication domain in the supermodel-api-docs codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [Connectivity Domain — supermodel-api-docs Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/supermodel-api-docs/domain-connectivity.html): Standardizes communication patterns between clients and servers. Architectural overview of the Connectivity domain in the supermodel-api-docs codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [Documentation Domain — supermodel-api-docs Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/supermodel-api-docs/domain-documentation.html): Handles the structure and presentation of developer-facing documentation and guides. Architectural overview of the Documentation domain in the supermodel-api-docs codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [OpenAPI Domain — supermodel-api-docs Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/supermodel-api-docs/domain-openapi.html): Defines the interface and endpoint contracts for the underlying API services. Architectural overview of the OpenAPI domain in the supermodel-api-docs codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [Styling Domain — supermodel-api-docs Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/supermodel-api-docs/domain-styling.html): Manages the visual identity and specific UI overrides for the documentation interface. Architectural overview of the Styling domain in the supermodel-api-docs codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [docs.json — supermodel-api-docs Source File](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/supermodel-api-docs/file-docs-json.html): Architecture documentation for docs.json, a json file in the supermodel-api-docs codebase.
- [overrides.css — supermodel-api-docs Source File](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/supermodel-api-docs/file-overrides-css.html): Architecture documentation for overrides.css, a css file in the supermodel-api-docs codebase.
